title: foreign_keys on SqliteConnectOptions not as post-connect PRAGMA — correct pool-wide enforcement
description: Why this choice is correct: a post-connect PRAGMA applies only to the connection it was executed on. With a pool of >1 connection, future connections would not have foreign_keys enabled and ON DELETE CASCADE would silently fail for them. The comment in WalletStore::new explains this. The current max_connections(1) makes it safe by coincidence today, but the SqliteConnectOptions approach makes it correct by design. A contributor might suggest moving back to a post-connect query because it is 'simpler' — do not do that. The pool might be widened in the future.
close_reason: Decision record — no code change required; rationale preserved in codebase
